columns.name: kornHANDLER
columns.description: The corn handler involved in the transaction

columns.name: fra_DATO
columns.description: Date from which the adjustment is applicable

columns.name: tekST
columns.description: Additional text or remarks related to the quality issue

columns.name: gir_KVALITET
columns.description: Indicates if quality is provided (F=For, M=Mat, I=Info)

columns.name: proSENT
columns.description: Percentage value related to the adjustment

columns.name: satS
columns.description: Rate or factor used in the calculation

columns.name: brUKERID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the user performing the action

columns.name: tidSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp of when the record was created or last modified

columns.name: saAKORN_TILL
columns.description: Code indicating if the corn is saaakorn (1=Yes, 0=No)

columns.name: skrives_M_0_BELOP
columns.description: Indicates if text should be written for amounts of zero (Ja/Nei)

columns.name: prIS
columns.description: Price adjustment based on quality deviation

columns.name: bare_BASISPRIS
columns.description: Indicates if only the basis price should be calculated (1=Yes, 0=No)

columns.name: frakTTILSKUDD
columns.description: Code to handle cases where frakt tilskudd is not applicable

columns.name: mjoldROYE
columns.description: Indicates if the quality error should be moved to kvf5_nr (1=Yes, 0=No)
